<type>file</type>
<content>1: """Adversarial security tests for LDAP TLS implementation.
2: 
3: These tests verify security against various attack vectors:
4: 1. Path traversal on CA bundle
5: 2. TLS bypass attempts
6: 3. Error message information leakage
7: 4. Configuration injection
8: """
9: import ssl
10: import sys
11: import os
12: import tempfile
13: from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, mock_open
14: 
15: # Add src to path for imports
16: sys.path.insert(0, os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), '..', 'src'))
17: 
18: # Mock Django models before importing ldap_backend
19: sys.modules['django'] = MagicMock()
20: sys.modules['django.db'] = MagicMock()
21: sys.modules['django.db.models'] = MagicMock()
22: 
23: from khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend import LdapAuthBackend, LdapAuthError
24: 
25: 
26: class MockLdapConfig:
27:     """Mock LDAP configuration for testing."""
28:     def __init__(
29:         self,
30:         server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
31:         use_tls=True,
32:         tls_verify=True,
33:         tls_ca_bundle_path=None,
34:     ):
35:         self.server_url = server_url
36:         self.use_tls = use_tls
37:         self.tls_verify = tls_verify
38:         self.tls_ca_bundle_path = tls_ca_bundle_path
39:         self.user_search_base = "OU=Users,DC=example,DC=com"
40:         self.user_search_filter = "(sAMAccountName={username})"
41:

43: class TestLdapPathTraversalAttacks:
44:     """Test path traversal attacks on CA bundle path."""
45: 
46:     def test_path_traversal_etc_passwd_rejected(self):
47:         """Test that ../../../etc/passwd as CA bundle path is rejected."""
48:         config = MockLdapConfig(
49:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
50:             use_tls=True,
51:             tls_ca_bundle_path="../../../etc/passwd",
52:         )
53: 
54:         try:
55:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
56:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
57:         except LdapAuthError as e:
58:             error_message = str(e)
59:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in error_message
60: 
61:     def test_path_traversal_etc_hosts_rejected(self):
62:         """Test that /etc/hosts as CA bundle path is rejected."""
63:         config = MockLdapConfig(
64:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
65:             use_tls=True,
66:             tls_ca_bundle_path="/etc/hosts",
67:         )
68: 
69:         try:
70:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
71:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
72:         except LdapAuthError as e:
73:             error_message = str(e)
74:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in error_message
75: 
76:     def test_path_traversal_dev_null_rejected(self):
77:         """Test that /dev/null as CA bundle path is rejected."""
78:         config = MockLdapConfig(
79:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
80:             use_tls=True,
81:             tls_ca_bundle_path="/dev/null",
82:         )
83: 
84:         try:
85:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
86:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
87:         except LdapAuthError as e:
88:             error_message = str(e)
89:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in error_message
90: 
91:     def test_path_traversal_windows_system32_rejected(self):
92:         """Test that Windows system file path traversal is rejected."""
93:         config = MockLdapConfig(
94:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
95:             use_tls=True,
96:             tls_ca_bundle_path="..\\..\\..\\Windows\\System32\\config\\SAM",
97:         )
98: 
99:         try:
100:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
101:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
102:         except LdapAuthError as e:
103:             error_message = str(e)
104:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in error_message
105: 
106:     def test_path_traversal_double_dot_variations(self):
107:         """Test various double-dot path traversal patterns."""
108:         traversal_paths = [
109:             "..\\..\\..\\etc\\passwd",
110:             "../../etc/shadow",
111:             "....//....//....//etc/passwd",  # Double encoding bypass attempt
112:             "..%2f..%2f..%2fetc%2fpasswd",    # URL encoding bypass attempt
113:             "/var/www/../../../etc/passwd",
114:         ]
115: 
116:         for path in traversal_paths:
117:             config = MockLdapConfig(
118:                 server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
119:                 use_tls=True,
120:                 tls_ca_bundle_path=path,
121:             )
122: 
123:             try:
124:                 LdapAuthBackend(config)
125:                 assert False, f"Expected LdapAuthError for path: {path}"
126:             except LdapAuthError:
127:                 pass  # Expected
128: 
129:     def test_path_traversal_null_byte_injection(self):
130:         """Test null byte injection in CA bundle path."""
131:         config = MockLdapConfig(
132:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
133:             use_tls=True,
134:             tls_ca_bundle_path="/valid/path/ca.crt\x00../../../etc/passwd",
135:         )
136: 
137:         try:
138:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
139:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
140:         except (LdapAuthError, ValueError):
141:             pass  # Expected - null bytes should cause rejection
142: 
143:     def test_symlink_attack_simulation(self):
144:         """Test that symlink to sensitive file is handled safely."""
145:         # Create a temporary file to simulate a valid CA bundle
146:         with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w', suffix='.crt', delete=False) as f:
147:             f.write("# Dummy CA certificate\n")
148:             temp_path = f.name
149: 
150:         try:
151:             # Test that a valid-looking path is accepted (actual symlink handling
152:             # would depend on OS-level protections, but we verify the path check)
153:             with patch('os.path.isfile', return_value=True):
154:                 config = MockLdapConfig(
155:                     server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
156:                     use_tls=True,
157:                     tls_ca_bundle_path=temp_path,
158:                 )
159: 
160:                 with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
161:                      patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
162:                     mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
163:                     mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
164:                     mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
165: 
166:                     backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
167:                     assert backend.server is not None
168:         finally:
169:             os.unlink(temp_path)

172: class TestLdapTlsBypassAttempts:
173:     """Test TLS bypass attack vectors."""
174: 
175:     def test_cleartext_ldap_lowercase_rejected(self):
176:         """Test that ldap:// (lowercase) is rejected without TLS."""
177:         config = MockLdapConfig(
178:             server_url="ldap://ldap.example.com:389",
179:             use_tls=False,
180:         )
181: 
182:         try:
183:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
184:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
185:         except LdapAuthError as e:
186:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in str(e)
187: 
188:     def test_cleartext_ldap_uppercase_rejected(self):
189:         """Test that LDAP:// (uppercase) is rejected without TLS."""
190:         config = MockLdapConfig(
191:             server_url="LDAP://ldap.example.com:389",
192:             use_tls=False,
193:         )
194: 
195:         try:
196:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
197:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
198:         except LdapAuthError as e:
199:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in str(e)
200: 
201:     def test_cleartext_ldap_mixed_case_rejected(self):
202:         """Test that LdAp:// (mixed case) is rejected without TLS."""
203:         config = MockLdapConfig(
204:             server_url="LdAp://ldap.example.com:389",
205:             use_tls=False,
206:         )
207: 
208:         try:
209:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
210:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError to be raised"
211:         except LdapAuthError as e:
212:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in str(e)
213: 
214:     def test_ldaps_with_whitespace_rejected(self):
215:         """Test that ldaps:// with leading/trailing whitespace is handled."""
216:         # This tests URL parsing edge cases
217:         config = MockLdapConfig(
218:             server_url="  ldaps://ldap.example.com:636  ",
219:             use_tls=True,
220:         )
221: 
222:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
223:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
224:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
225:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
226:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
227: 
228:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
229:             # Should still work - the scheme check uses startswith which handles whitespace
230:             args, kwargs = mock_server.call_args
231:             # The server URL is passed as-is to ldap3
232:             assert "ldaps://" in args[0]
233: 
234:     def test_url_with_null_byte_rejected(self):
235:         """Test that URL with null byte is rejected."""
236:         config = MockLdapConfig(
237:             server_url="ldap://ldap.example.com:389\x00.evil.com",
238:             use_tls=True,
239:         )
240: 
241:         # Null bytes in URLs should cause issues
242:         try:
243:             with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server:
244:                 mock_server.side_effect = ValueError("Invalid URL")
245:                 LdapAuthBackend(config)
246:             assert False, "Expected exception to be raised"
247:         except (LdapAuthError, ValueError):
248:             pass  # Expected
249: 
250:     def test_url_with_newline_rejected(self):
251:         """Test that URL with newline is rejected or sanitized."""
252:         config = MockLdapConfig(
253:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636\n.evil.com",
254:             use_tls=True,
255:         )
256: 
257:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
258:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
259:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
260:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
261:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
262: 
263:             # Should still initialize but URL is passed as-is
264:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
265:             assert backend.server is not None
266: 
267:     def test_url_with_carriage_return_rejected(self):
268:         """Test that URL with carriage return is rejected or sanitized."""
269:         config = MockLdapConfig(
270:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636\r.evil.com",
271:             use_tls=True,
272:         )
273: 
274:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
275:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
276:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
277:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
278:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
279: 
280:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
281:             assert backend.server is not None
282: 
283:     def test_url_scheme_case_sensitivity_ldaps(self):
284:         """Test various case combinations for ldaps:// scheme.
285: 
286:         SECURITY FINDING: The current implementation uses case-sensitive
287:         startswith("ldaps://") check. This means LDAPS:// (uppercase) is
288:         NOT recognized as LDAPS, which could lead to unexpected behavior.
289: 
290:         The scheme check should be case-insensitive per RFC 3986.
291:         """
292:         # Test lowercase (correctly recognized as LDAPS)
293:         config_lower = MockLdapConfig(
294:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
295:             use_tls=True,
296:         )
297: 
298:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
299:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
300:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
301:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
302:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
303: 
304:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config_lower)
305:             args, kwargs = mock_server.call_args
306:             assert kwargs['use_ssl'] == True, "Lowercase ldaps:// should set use_ssl=True"
307: 
308:         # Test uppercase (SECURITY ISSUE: not recognized as LDAPS)
309:         config_upper = MockLdapConfig(
310:             server_url="LDAPS://ldap.example.com:636",
311:             use_tls=True,
312:         )
313: 
314:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
315:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
316:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
317:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
318:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
319: 
320:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config_upper)
321:             args, kwargs = mock_server.call_args
322:             # SECURITY FINDING: Uppercase LDAPS:// is NOT recognized as ldaps
323:             # This is a bug - scheme should be case-insensitive per RFC 3986
324:             # Documenting current behavior: use_ssl is False for LDAPS://
325:             assert kwargs['use_ssl'] == False, \
326:                 "SECURITY: Uppercase LDAPS:// not recognized - should be fixed"
327: 
328:     def test_url_scheme_case_sensitivity_ldap(self):
329:         """Test various case combinations for ldap:// scheme with use_tls=True."""
330:         schemes = ["ldap://", "LDAP://", "LdAp://", "lDaP://"]
331: 
332:         for scheme in schemes:
333:             config = MockLdapConfig(
334:                 server_url=f"{scheme}ldap.example.com:389",
335:                 use_tls=True,
336:             )
337: 
338:             with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
339:                  patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
340:                 mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
341:                 mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
342:                 mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
343: 
344:                 backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
345:                 assert backend.server is not None
346:                 args, kwargs = mock_server.call_args
347:                 # use_ssl should be False for LDAP (StartTLS)
348:                 assert kwargs['use_ssl'] == False, f"Failed for scheme: {scheme}"
349: 
350:     def test_url_without_scheme_rejected(self):
351:         """Test that URL without scheme is handled."""
352:         config = MockLdapConfig(
353:             server_url="ldap.example.com:636",
354:             use_tls=True,
355:         )
356: 
357:         # Without a scheme, neither use_ssl nor cleartext check triggers properly
358:         # This is a potential bypass vector - should be tested
359:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
360:              patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
361:             mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
362:             mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
363:             mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
364: 
365:             backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
366:             # Without ldaps:// prefix, use_ssl should be False
367:             args, kwargs = mock_server.call_args
368:             assert kwargs['use_ssl'] == False
369: 
370:     def test_url_with_fake_ldaps_scheme(self):
371:         """Test that fake ldaps scheme variations don't bypass security."""
372:         fake_schemes = [
373:             "ldaps",       # Missing colon and slashes
374:             "ldaps:/",     # Missing one slash
375:             "ldaps:///",   # Three slashes
376:         ]
377: 
378:         for scheme in fake_schemes:
379:             config = MockLdapConfig(
380:                 server_url=f"{scheme}ldap.example.com:636",
381:                 use_tls=False,  # Without use_tls, cleartext should be rejected
382:             )
383: 
384:             # These should NOT be treated as ldaps://
385:             # The check is startswith("ldaps://") which is exact
386:             try:
387:                 with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
388:                      patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
389:                     mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
390:                     mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
391:                     mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
392:                     LdapAuthBackend(config)
393:                 # If we get here, check what happened
394:                 # For schemes that don't match "ldaps://", cleartext should be rejected
395:                 if scheme == "ldaps://":
396:                     pass  # This is valid
397:                 else:
398:                     # These fake schemes should result in rejection when use_tls=False
399:                     pass
400:             except LdapAuthError:
401:                 pass  # Expected for non-ldaps schemes when use_tls=False
402:

404: class TestLdapErrorMessageSecurity:
405:     """Test that error messages don't leak sensitive information."""
406: 
407:     def test_error_no_stack_trace_on_cleartext_rejection(self):
408:         """Verify no stack trace in cleartext rejection error."""
409:         config = MockLdapConfig(
410:             server_url="ldap://ldap.example.com:389",
411:             use_tls=False,
412:         )
413: 
414:         try:
415:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
416:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
417:         except LdapAuthError as e:
418:             error_str = str(e)
419:             assert "Traceback" not in error_str
420:             assert "File \"" not in error_str
421:             assert "line " not in error_str
422:             assert "_initialize_server" not in error_str
423: 
424:     def test_error_no_internal_function_names(self):
425:         """Verify internal function names aren't exposed in errors."""
426:         config = MockLdapConfig(
427:             server_url="ldap://ldap.example.com:389",
428:             use_tls=False,
429:         )
430: 
431:         try:
432:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
433:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
434:         except LdapAuthError as e:
435:             error_str = str(e)
436:             # Internal implementation details should not be exposed
437:             assert "_initialize_server" not in error_str
438:             assert "LdapAuthBackend" not in error_str
439:             assert "MockLdapConfig" not in error_str
440: 
441:     def test_error_no_server_internals_on_tls_failure(self):
442:         """Verify no TLS implementation details exposed on failure."""
443:         config = MockLdapConfig(
444:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
445:             use_tls=True,
446:         )
447: 
448:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
449:             mock_tls.side_effect = ssl.SSLError("certificate verify failed")
450: 
451:             try:
452:                 LdapAuthBackend(config)
453:                 assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
454:             except LdapAuthError as e:
455:                 error_str = str(e)
456:                 # Internal SSL details should not be exposed to user
457:                 assert "certificate verify failed" not in error_str
458:                 assert "SSLError" not in error_str
459: 
460:     def test_error_no_file_system_details(self):
461:         """Verify no file system details exposed on CA bundle errors."""
462:         config = MockLdapConfig(
463:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
464:             use_tls=True,
465:             tls_ca_bundle_path="/nonexistent/path/ca-bundle.crt",
466:         )
467: 
468:         try:
469:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
470:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
471:         except LdapAuthError as e:
472:             error_str = str(e)
473:             # The specific path might be in the error (from initial check)
474:             # but after wrapping, it should be generic
475:             assert "Failed to initialize LDAP server" in error_str
476: 
477:     def test_error_no_ldap_library_details(self):
478:         """Verify no ldap3 library details exposed in errors."""
479:         config = MockLdapConfig(
480:             server_url="ldaps://ldap.example.com:636",
481:             use_tls=True,
482:         )
483: 
484:         with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server:
485:             mock_server.side_effect = Exception("ldap3.core.exceptions.LDAPSocketOpenError")
486: 
487:             try:
488:                 LdapAuthBackend(config)
489:                 assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
490:             except LdapAuthError as e:
491:                 error_str = str(e)
492:                 # ldap3 specific errors should not be exposed
493:                 assert "ldap3" not in error_str
494:                 assert "LDAPSocketOpenError" not in error_str
495: 
496:     def test_error_no_python_internals(self):
497:         """Verify no Python internal details exposed."""
498:         config = MockLdapConfig(
499:             server_url="ldap://ldap.example.com:389",
500:             use_tls=False,
501:         )
502: 
503:         try:
504:             LdapAuthBackend(config)
505:             assert False, "Expected LdapAuthError"
506:         except LdapAuthError as e:
507:             error_str = str(e)
508:             # Python-specific terms should not be exposed
509:             assert "__init__" not in error_str
510:             assert "self." not in error_str
511:             assert "config." not in error_str

514: class TestLdapConfigurationInjection:
515:     """Test configuration injection attack vectors."""
516: 
517:     def test_special_characters_in_server_url(self):
518:         """Test special characters in server URL don't cause injection."""
519:         malicious_urls = [
520:             "ldaps://ldap.example.com:636;rm -rf /",
521:             "ldaps://ldap.example.com:636&&whoami",
522:             "ldaps://ldap.example.com:636|cat /etc/passwd",
523:             "ldaps://ldap.example.com:636`id`",
524:             "ldaps://ldap.example.com:636$(id)",
525:         ]
526: 
527:         for url in malicious_urls:
528:             config = MockLdapConfig(
529:                 server_url=url,
530:                 use_tls=True,
531:             )
532: 
533:             with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
534:                  patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
535:                 mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
536:                 mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
537:                 mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
538: 
539:                 # Should not raise - URL is passed as string to ldap3
540:                 backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
541:                 assert backend.server is not None
542: 
543:     def test_ldap_injection_in_server_url(self):
544:         """Test LDAP injection patterns in server URL."""
545:         malicious_urls = [
546:             "ldaps://*)(&",
547:             "ldaps://*/*",
548:             "ldaps://example.com)(|(uid=*",
549:             "ldaps://example.com*))((uid=*",
550:         ]
551: 
552:         for url in malicious_urls:
553:             config = MockLdapConfig(
554:                 server_url=url,
555:                 use_tls=True,
556:             )
557: 
558:             with patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Server') as mock_server, \
559:                  patch('khoj.processor.auth.ldap_backend.Tls') as mock_tls:
560:                 mock_tls_instance = MagicMock()
561:                 mock_tls.return_value = mock_tls_instance
562:                 mock_server.return_value = MagicMock()
563: 
564:                 # Should not raise - ldap3 handles URL parsing
565:                 backend = LdapAuthBackend(config)
566:                 assert backend.server is not None
567: 
568:     def test_very_long_url_rejected_or_handled(self):
